heading: Advertising
label: 1468a Advertising
text: No savings association shall carry on any sale, plan, or practices, or any advertising, in violation of regulations promulgated by a Federal banking agency.
notes: Amendments2010— substituted “a Federal banking agency” for “the Director”.Pub. L. 111–203
Effective Date of 2010 AmendmentAmendment by effective on the transfer date, see , set out as a note under , The Congress.Pub. L. 111–203section 351 of Pub. L. 111–203section 906 of Title 2
